home.authentic_handmade_desc: Every rug in our collection is a unique masterpiece, hand-knotted by artisans using techniques passed down through generations.
home.curated_collection_desc: With over 95,000 pieces, we offer the world's most extensive curated selection of high-end rugs.
home.worldwide_shipping_desc: We bring the bazaar to your doorstep with white-glove, insured shipping to over 150 countries.
home.our_story_text: For generations, we have sourced the finest hand-knotted rugs from the ancient weaving regions of Afghanistan, Persia and beyond.
home.legacy_text1: Afghan Tappeti was born from a passion for the loom and a commitment to preserving the nomadic heritage of Central Asia.
home.legacy_text2: Today, we bridge the gap between ancient craftsmanship and contemporary luxury, sourcing directly from weaving families.
home.review_1_text: The Khal Mohammadi rug I received is even more stunning in person. The depth of color is unlike anything found in mass-produced pieces. It has completely transformed our living space.
home.review_2_text: Incredible curation. Finding authentic vintage Oushaks in this condition is a rarity. Afghan Tappeti is now my go-to for all my high-end residential projects.
home.review_3_text: The white-glove delivery to New York was seamless. The rug was packaged with extreme care. It's truly a piece of history on our floor.
home.instagram_text: Tag us to be featured in our lifestyle gallery.
home.newsletter_title: Become Part of the Afghan Tappeti Family
home.newsletter_subtitle: Subscribe to receive exclusive collection previews, artisan stories, and interior design inspiration.

about.heritage_text: Afghan Tappeti was born from a deep reverence for the ancient art of hand-knotting. For centuries, the weavers of Afghanistan, Persia and Anatolia have passed down techniques that transform raw wool and natural dyes into heirloom masterpieces.
about.knotting_text: Every rug in our collection is entirely hand-knotted — a process that can take months or even years to complete. Each knot is tied by hand, following patterns held in memory and tradition.
about.ethical_text: We work directly with weaving families and cooperatives, ensuring fair wages and preserving traditions that might otherwise be lost. Every purchase supports artisan communities.
about.quote: A rug is not made to be walked on. It is made to be walked through — a landscape of thread and color.
about.hero_title_line1: The Heritage of the Silk Road
about.hero_subtitle: Weaving the past into the modern home with timeless craftsmanship from the heart of Afghanistan.
about.heritage_p1: For three generations, the Afghan Tappeti family has curated the finest hand-knotted rugs from the nomadic tribes and urban master-weavers of Herat and Persia.
about.heritage_p2: Each rug is more than a floor covering; it is a repository of history, featuring motifs passed down through centuries.
about.knotting_intro: Every rug in our collection is 100% hand-knotted — never machine-made. A single Afghan Tappeti can take up to 14 months to complete. Our artisans use the traditional asymmetrical knotting technique, ensuring a level of detail, character, and durability that machine-made replicas can never achieve. When you buy from Afghan Tappeti, you are purchasing an authentic handcrafted heirloom, not a factory product.
about.knotting_1_text: We use only organic dyes derived from madder root, pomegranate rinds, and indigo—colors that age gracefully over decades.
about.knotting_2_text: Every rug begins on a vertical loom, where the weaver translates mental maps into intricate physical patterns knot by knot.
about.knotting_3_text: After weaving, the rug is sheared and washed in mountain spring water to bring out the natural luster of the wool.
about.ethical_1_text: We believe in a transparent supply chain. Our weavers are partners, not just producers. We ensure fair living wages that are 40% above the local industry average.
about.ethical_2_text: Traditional methods are inherently sustainable. By using locally sourced Ghazni wool and plant-based dyes, we minimize our ecological footprint.
about.quote_text: A rug is the soul of the room. It anchors the space and carries the echoes of ancient winds.

blog.title: Our Journal
blog.subtitle: Stories from the world of hand-knotted rugs.
blog.fallback_p1: The art of Persian rug making is one of the oldest continuous craft traditions in the world.
blog.fallback_p2: From the royal workshops of Safavid Isfahan to the nomadic tribes of Fars province, each region developed its own distinctive patterns.

styles.title: Shop by Style
styles.subtitle: Curated selections to match your home's unique personality.

scandinavian.name: Scandinavian
scandinavian.desc: Light, airy spaces call for rugs with understated patterns and natural textures. Our Scandinavian collection features muted tones and simple geometric motifs.

classic.name: Classic
classic.desc: Timeless elegance meets traditional craftsmanship. Our Classic collection showcases medallion patterns, rich borders, and heritage designs.

minimal.name: Minimal
minimal.desc: Clean lines and neutral palettes define modern minimalism. These rugs provide subtle texture and warmth without overwhelming the space.

bohemian.name: Bohemian
bohemian.desc: Free-spirited and eclectic, our Bohemian collection brings vibrant colors, tribal motifs, and artistic expression to any room.

luxury.name: Luxury
luxury.desc: Indulge in the finest silk and hand-spun wool rugs. Each piece is a masterpiece of luxury craftsmanship, designed for discerning collectors.

modern.name: Modern
modern.desc: Bold abstracts, contemporary patterns, and innovative designs define our Modern collection — perfect for today's forward-thinking interiors.

rooms.title: Find Your Perfect Space

living_room.name: Living Room
living_room.desc: The heart of your home deserves a rug that anchors the space with warmth and style. From large-format traditional pieces to contemporary statement rugs.

bedroom.name: Bedroom

hallway.name: Hallway & Entryway

nursery.name: Nursery & Kids Room
nursery.desc: Safe, soft, and delightful — our nursery collection uses natural materials and low-pile weaves, perfect for little ones to play and grow.

faq_page.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_page.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our rugs, ordering, and care.
faq_page.a1: Yes, every rug in our collection is hand-knotted by skilled artisans using traditional techniques passed down through generations.
faq_page.q2: How do I choose the right size?
faq_page.a2: Measure your room and consider furniture placement. A common rule is to leave 18-24 inches of bare floor around the rug's edges. Our size guide can help you decide.
faq_page.a3: We use premium natural materials including wool, silk, and cotton. Each product page lists the specific materials used.
faq_page.a4: Yes, we ship across Europe and internationally. Shipping costs and delivery times are calculated at checkout.
faq_page.a5: We offer a 14-day return policy on all rugs. The rug must be in its original condition. Custom and made-to-order items are non-returnable.
faq_page.q6: How do I care for my rug?
faq_page.a6: Regular vacuuming, rotating every few months, and professional cleaning every 1-2 years will keep your rug beautiful for generations.
faq_page.a7: Yes, we offer sample swatches for most of our rugs. Contact our team and we will arrange a sample for you.
faq_page.a8: Standard delivery takes 5-10 business days within Europe. Express shipping is available at an additional cost.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy_page.intro: At Afghan Tappeti, we take your privacy seriously. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our website.
privacy_page.data_collected: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, shipping address, and payment details when placing an order. We also automatically collect certain technical data including IP address, browser type, and browsing behavior.
privacy_page.data_usage: We use your information to process orders, communicate with you, improve our services, and send marketing communications with your consent.
privacy_page.data_sharing: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with trusted service providers (payment processors, shipping carriers) only as necessary to fulfill your order.
privacy_page.cookies: Our website uses essential cookies for functionality and analytics cookies to improve your experience. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy_page.rights: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. Contact us at privacy@afghantappeti.com for any privacy-related requests.
privacy_page.changes: We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

terms_page.title: Terms & Conditions
terms_page.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our website.
terms_page.intro: By accessing or purchasing from Afghan Tappeti, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions.
terms_page.products: All product descriptions, images, and pricing are subject to change without notice. We strive to display accurate colors but your monitor may show variations.
terms_page.pricing: Prices are listed in Euros (EUR) and include applicable taxes. We reserve the right to modify prices at any time.
terms_page.orders: We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order. In the event of a pricing error, we will notify you and offer the option to confirm at the correct price or cancel.
terms_page.intellectual: All content on this website, including images, text, and designs, is the property of Afghan Tappeti and may not be reproduced without permission.
terms_page.liability: Afghan Tappeti shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or website.

shipping_page.title: Shipping & Returns
shipping_page.subtitle: Information about our shipping policies and return process.
shipping_page.shipping_text: We offer free standard shipping on all orders within Italy. International shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on destination and order size. All shipments are fully tracked and insured.
shipping_page.delivery_times: Standard delivery takes 5-10 business days within Europe. Express shipping (2-4 business days) is available at an additional cost. Please allow additional time for rural areas and international destinations.
shipping_page.returns_text: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in original condition. To initiate a return, contact our customer service team. Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer unless the item is defective.
shipping_page.refunds: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive and inspect the returned item. The refund will be issued to the original payment method.
shipping_page.exclusions: Custom, made-to-order, and sale items are non-returnable unless defective. Please contact us before returning any item.

care_guide_page.title: Rug Care Guide
care_guide_page.subtitle: How to keep your hand-knotted rug beautiful for generations.
care_guide_page.vacuuming_text: Vacuum your rug regularly (at least once a week) to remove surface dirt and dust. Use a suction-only vacuum or turn off the rotating brush to avoid pulling fibers.
care_guide_page.rotation_text: Rotate your rug every 3-6 months to ensure even wear, especially in areas exposed to direct sunlight to prevent uneven fading.
care_guide_page.cleaning_text: Have your rug professionally cleaned every 1-2 years. Hand-knotted rugs require special care — always use a cleaner experienced with natural fiber rugs.
care_guide_page.spills_text: Blot spills immediately with a clean, dry cloth. Never rub. For stubborn stains, consult a professional cleaner. Avoid using harsh chemicals.
care_guide_page.storage_text: Store your rug rolled (never folded) in a cool, dry place. Use a breathable fabric cover. Add cedar balls or lavender sachets to deter moths naturally.
care_guide_page.sunlight_text: Prolonged exposure to direct sunlight can fade natural dyes. Use curtains or blinds during peak sunlight hours, or rotate your rug periodically.
